creator: Nakai@Technologist.com
text:
I have fixed the icewm port to follow its latest version.
Now icewm is 0.9.4 and support gtk theme.

Yukihiro Nakai
--------------
diff -ruN icewm.orig/Makefile icewm/Makefile
--- icewm.orig/Makefile	Mon May 25 19:22:43 1998
+++ icewm/Makefile	Wed Jun  3 14:53:07 1998
@@ -1,12 +1,12 @@
 # New ports collection makefile for:   icewm
-# Version required:    0.8.16
+# Version required:    0.9.4
 # Date created:        10 August 1997
 # Whom:                Yukihiro Nakai <Nakai@Mlab.t.u-tokyo.ac.jp>
 #
 # $Id: Makefile,v 1.8 1998/05/25 04:00:50 steve Exp $
 #
 
-DISTNAME=	icewm-0.8.16
+DISTNAME=	icewm-0.9.4
 CATEGORIES=	x11
 MASTER_SITES=	http://ixtas.fri.uni-lj.si/%7Emarkom/icewm/
 EXTRACT_SUFX=	.src.tar.gz
diff -ruN icewm.orig/files/md5 icewm/files/md5
--- icewm.orig/files/md5	Sun May  3 07:24:52 1998
+++ icewm/files/md5	Wed Jun  3 14:46:32 1998
@@ -1 +1 @@
-MD5 (icewm-0.8.16.src.tar.gz) = 869842bea85f43101d0d68420846b510
+MD5 (icewm-0.9.4.src.tar.gz) = e3b2d55b624cde547d89a74fd4c64e3f
diff -ruN icewm.orig/pkg/PLIST icewm/pkg/PLIST
--- icewm.orig/pkg/PLIST	Sun May  3 07:24:53 1998
+++ icewm/pkg/PLIST	Wed Jun  3 14:54:57 1998
@@ -49,6 +49,61 @@
 lib/X11/icewm/taskbar/unreadmail.xpm
 lib/X11/icewm/taskbar/windows.xpm
 lib/X11/icewm/taskbar/xfreeos2.xpm

+lib/X11/icewm/themes/gtk/dframeITR.xpm

 lib/X11/icewm/themes/metal/closeA.xpm

 lib/X11/icewm/themes/metal/default.theme
@@ -187,6 +242,7 @@
 @dirrm lib/X11/icewm/icons
 @dirrm lib/X11/icewm/ledclock
 @dirrm lib/X11/icewm/taskbar
+@dirrm lib/X11/icewm/themes/gtk
 @dirrm lib/X11/icewm/themes/metal
 @dirrm lib/X11/icewm/themes/motif
 @dirrm lib/X11/icewm/themes/nice
